name: CI agent
pattern: Trigger -> bounded task -> GitHub API tools -> PR/comment/status output
scenario: A GitHub Action reviews a pull request and posts a bounded genome report without arbitrary shell access.
workflow_steps: Start from a CI trigger with declared permissions.
Use GitHub API tools instead of arbitrary shell by default.
Post PR comment, status, or release note output.
policy_gates: No arbitrary shell or broad token permissions in CI by default.

input_contract.description: Concrete scenario input for this pattern example.
